title: session.open request

run_manifest.description: 可选 xdebug.run-manifest.v1 路径；提供时在启动 engine 前严格校验 target 资源。

bind.description: Action-specific bind input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

bind_host.description: Action-specific bind_host input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

host.description: Action-specific host input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

port.description: Action-specific port input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

session_id.description: Action-specific session_id input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

transport.description: Action-specific transport input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Open a design, waveform, or combined debug session.
x-how_it_works: 解析 target 中的 daidir/fsdb；可选 target.run_manifest 会在启动前校验 published state、canonical path、size 与 SHA-256。
x-when_to_use: 建立后续 design/waveform 查询的资源上下文。

do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 session.close、session.doctor 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
